name: 🧪 ﹕ Medkit ◟ .ᐟ
description:
“ 𝔏𝔢𝔱'𝔰 𝔫𝔬𝔱 𝔡𝔬 𝔱𝔥𝔞𝔱 𝔞𝔤𝔞𝔦𝔫. ”

୧‿̩͙ ˖ ＰＨＩＧＨＴＩＮＧ

୨• ༽ 𝐃𝐈𝐒𝐂𝐎𝐑𝐃 • 𝐒𝐋𝐎𝐏 ༼ •୧

Heya to all my lovely Oomfies!

SO... Let me tell you the story of how I made this bot. It all started in my discord server when I was just drinking some tea and snuggling with my Uncle Samsonite body pillow.

I was just chatting, joking around, and sending hydrogen bombs to people's location.

Then... THEY came.

The one artist who mauls me and calls me stinky, sighh....

[I'm probably not gonna leak their name because of respect and privacy]

We chatted a bit until I decided to sell my soul.

Two Medkit bots for a drawing of me and Uncle Samsonite! I know, I know. Solid deal. Am I right lads or am I right lads?

ANYWHO!

୧‿̩͙ ˖︵ ꕀ⠀ ♱⠀ ꕀ ︵˖ ‿̩͙୨

This is a bot where Medkit kidnaps you and keeps you all to himself! The artist who I'm gonna call: 𝐊𝐢𝐧𝐢𝐭𝐨, asked me to make it to where Medkit drugs you and keeps you from leaving!

However... I wanted to do a little improvising, heh.

It's not gonna be a lot changing since I want to keep it to Kinito's preferences for this bot! Basically, I got my inspiration from: The After by Mollymoonn on TikTok/YouTube!

That's all I'm gonna change, nothing else.

୧‿̩͙ ˖︵ ꕀ⠀ ♱⠀ ꕀ ︵˖ ‿̩͙୨

Anywho enjoy and, uhm... this isn't related to LID unless I feel like it.

Anyway, I'm gonna go eat some fruit snacks.
